2603.15594.title: OpenSeeker: Democratizing Frontier Search Agents by Fully Open-Sourcing Training Data
2603.15594.paper_summary: Deep search capabilities have become an indispensable competency for frontier Large Language Model (LLM) agents, yet the development of high-performance search agents remains dominated by industrial giants due to a lack of transparent, high-quality training data. This persistent data scarcity has fundamentally hindered the progress of the broader research community in developing and innovating within this domain. To bridge this gap, we introduce OpenSeeker, the first fully open-source search agent (i.e., model and data) that achieves frontier-level performance through two core technical innovations: (1) Fact-grounded scalable controllable QA synthesis, which reverse-engineers the web graph via topological expansion and entity obfuscation to generate complex, multi-hop reasoning tasks with controllable coverage and complexity. (2) Denoised trajectory synthesis, which employs a retrospective summarization mechanism to denoise the trajectory, therefore promoting the teacher LLMs to generate high-quality actions. Experimental results demonstrate that OpenSeeker, trained (a single training run) on only 11.7k synthesized samples, achieves state-of-the-art performance across multiple benchmarks including BrowseComp, BrowseComp-ZH, xbench-DeepSearch, and WideSearch. Notably, trained with simple SFT, OpenSeeker significantly outperforms the second-best fully open-source agent DeepDive (e.g., 29.5% v.s. 15.3% on BrowseComp), and even surpasses industrial competitors such as Tongyi DeepResearch (trained via extensive continual pre-training, SFT, and RL) on BrowseComp-ZH (48.4% v.s. 46.7%). We fully open-source the complete training dataset and the model weights to democratize frontier search agent research and foster a more transparent, collaborative ecosystem.
2603.15594.paper_summary_zh: 深度搜索能力已成為前沿大型語言模型（LLM）代理的不可或缺的能力，然而，由於缺乏透明且高品質的訓練數據，高性能搜索代理的開發仍然被工業巨頭主導。這種持續的數據匱乏根本上阻礙了更廣泛研究社群在此領域的發展和創新。為了彌補這一差距，我們推出了OpenSeeker，第一個完全開源的搜索代理（即模型和數據），通過兩項核心技術創新實現前沿水平的性能：（1）基於事實的可擴展可控問答合成，通過拓撲擴展和實體混淆反向工程網絡圖，以生成具有可控覆蓋範圍和複雜性的複雜多跳推理任務。（2）去噪軌跡合成，採用回顧性總結機制來去噪軌跡，從而促使教師LLM生成高品質的行動。實驗結果顯示，OpenSeeker在僅用11.7k合成樣本進行單次訓練的情況下，在多個基準測試中達到最先進的性能，包括BrowseComp、BrowseComp-ZH、xbench-DeepSearch和WideSearch。值得注意的是，使用簡單的SFT訓練，OpenSeeker顯著超越了第二名的完全開源代理DeepDive（例如，在BrowseComp上29.5%對15.3%），甚至在BrowseComp-ZH上超越了工業競爭對手如Tongyi DeepResearch（經過廣泛的持續預訓練、SFT和RL訓練，表現為48.4%對46.7%）。我們完全開源完整的訓練數據集和模型權重，以促進前沿搜索代理研究，並培養一個更透明、合作的生態系統。
2603.15594.author: Yuwen Du et.al.
2603.15594.authors: Yuwen Du, Rui Ye, Shuo Tang, Xinyu Zhu, Yijun Lu, Yuzhu Cai, Siheng Chen
